11.reason: [The loop condition is incorrect: getchar() returns EOF on end-of-file or error, which may be -1, and assigning it to str[i] then checking truthiness will not correctly detect newline-only termination. Also, the null terminator is never added to str, leading to undefined behavior in subsequent strlen calls.]
